measure_preserving.description: Measure-preserving systems: T*mu = mu; ergodic = irreducible — single orbit

birkhoff_ergodic.description: Birkhoff ergodic theorem: time average = space average; pointwise convergence

szemeredi_theorem.description: Szemeredi: every positive-density set contains k-APs; proved via ergodic theory
